query: fluorescent overhead lighting institutional office interior unflattering harsh
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — fluorescent institutional interiors, depressing offices/corridors, depthless cold light

response.objective_caption: Parallel diagonal stripes of light and shadow traverse the frame from upper right to lower left. Bright white bands alternate with softer pale gray and warm beige areas, suggesting angled illumination across a smooth, uniform surface.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph rendered with extreme overexposure, where blown-out diagonal white bands alternate against pale gray and beige streaks, eliminating any recognizable subject. Fine detail is absent as surfaces appear smeared and mushy, with light and shadow dissolving into ambiguity. Soft parallel stripes run from the upper right to the lower left across a textureless field.
